name: David Bateman
biography: David Bateman is an award-winning composer & multi-instrumentalist. He is enthusiastic about illustrating a project's story through the power of music. He has written music for countless features, TV shows and numerous ad campaigns. His composition style is a unique approach in creating musical textures, making off-beat and imperfect instruments in his cinematic orchestral writing. David resides in Detroit, and works remotely from his home studio.
